# YRWA Time Series Modeling & Forecasting


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}

library(forecast)
library(Kendall)
library(tseries)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(cowplot)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(smooth)
library(zoo)
library(kableExtra)
library(tidyr)

```

### Yellow-rumped warbler + models / results

#### Monthly Observation

```{r}
# Monthly Data
YRWA_monthly <- read.csv("./Data/Cleaned_bySpecies/Warbler_Monthly.csv")
YRWA_monthly_obs <- read.csv("./Data/Cleaned_bySpecies/Warbler_Monthly_withObserver.csv")

head(YRWA_monthly)
head(YRWA_monthly_obs)
```

```{r}
# filter observation from 2015-1-1 to 2025-12-31
# filter observation from 2015-01-01 to 2025-12-31
YRWA_monthly <- YRWA_monthly %>% 
  mutate(
    date = ymd(date),
    month = month(date)
  ) %>% 
  filter(date >= as.Date("2015-01-01") &
         date <= as.Date("2025-12-31"))

YRWA_monthly_obs <- YRWA_monthly_obs %>% 
  mutate(
    date = ymd(date),
    month = month(date)
  ) %>% 
  filter(date >= as.Date("2015-01-01") &
         date <= as.Date("2025-12-31"))


str(YRWA_monthly)
head(YRWA_monthly)

str(YRWA_monthly_obs)
head(YRWA_monthly_obs)
```


```{r}
# convert to ts
YRWA_obs_ts <- ts(
  YRWA_monthly$mean_obs,
  start = c(2015, 1),
  frequency = 12
)

# plot
autoplot(YRWA_obs_ts) +
  xlab("Time") +
  ylab("Mean Observations") +
  ggtitle("Monthly YRWA Observations (2015–2025)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)
```

```{r}
YRWA_obs_ts_cleaned <- tsclean(YRWA_obs_ts)

autoplot(YRWA_obs_ts, series = "Original Data") +
  autolayer(YRWA_obs_ts_cleaned, series = "Cleaned Data") +
  xlab("Time") +
  ylab("Mean Observations") +
  ggtitle("Outlier Removal: Monthly YRWA Observations") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
    legend.justification = c(0, 1),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )
```


```{r}
YRWA_obs_stl <- stl(YRWA_obs_ts, s.window = "periodic")

autoplot(YRWA_obs_stl)
```

#### Monthly Observer Ratio

```{r}
bird_data <- read.csv("./Data/Raw/eBird_Species_Data.csv")
```

```{r}
# daily total observers
daily_total_observers <- bird_data %>%
  mutate(
    OBSERVATION.DATE = as.Date(OBSERVATION.DATE),
    date = OBSERVATION.DATE
  ) %>%
  filter(
    date >= as.Date("2015-01-01") &
    date <= as.Date("2025-12-31")
  ) %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(
    total_observers = n_distinct(OBSERVER.ID),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

head(daily_total_observers)
```

```{r}
# daily observer
YRWA_daily_obs <- read.csv("./Data/Cleaned_bySpecies/Warbler_Daily_withObserver.csv")

YRWA_daily_obs <- YRWA_daily_obs %>%
  mutate(
    date = ymd(date),
    month = month(date)
  ) %>% 
  filter(date >= as.Date("2015-01-01") &
         date <= as.Date("2025-12-31"))

head(YRWA_daily_obs)
```

```{r}
# daily ratio
YRWA_daily_ratio <- daily_total_observers %>%
  left_join(YRWA_daily_obs, by = "date") %>%
  mutate(
    sum_observers = ifelse(is.na(sum_observers), 0, sum_observers),
    sum_obs = ifelse(is.na(sum_obs), 0, sum_obs),
    observer_ratio = ifelse(total_observers == 0, 0, sum_observers / total_observers)
  )

head(YRWA_daily_ratio)
```

```{r}
# monthly ratio
YRWA_monthly_ratio <- YRWA_daily_ratio %>%
  mutate(date = floor_date(date, "month")) %>% 
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_obs = mean(sum_obs),
    mean_observers = mean(sum_observers),
    mean_observer_ratio = mean(observer_ratio),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

head(YRWA_monthly_ratio)
```


```{r}
# convert to monthly ts
YRWA_ratio_ts <- ts(
  YRWA_monthly_ratio$mean_observer_ratio,
  start = c(2015, 1),
  frequency = 12
)

# plot
autoplot(YRWA_ratio_ts) +
  xlab("Time") +
  ylab("Mean Observations") +
  ggtitle("Monthly YRWA Observer Ratio (2015–2025)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)
```
#### Data Visualization & Comparison

```{r}
month_colors <- c(
  "1" = "#4575b4",  # Jan - cold blue
  "2" = "#74add1",
  "3" = "#abd9e9",
  "4" = "#e0f3f8",
  "5" = "#fee090",
  "6" = "#fdae61",
  "7" = "#f46d43",
  "8" = "#f46d43",  # peak summer - hot red
  "9" = "#fdae61",
  "10" = "#fee090",
  "11" = "#abd9e9",
  "12" = "#4575b4"  # Dec - cold again
)

obs_df <- YRWA_monthly %>%
  select(month, value = mean_obs) %>%
  mutate(type = "Observations")

ratio_df <- YRWA_daily_ratio %>%
  select(month, value = observer_ratio) %>%
  mutate(type = "Observer Ratio")

plot_df <- bind_rows(obs_df, ratio_df)

plot_df$month <- factor(plot_df$month, levels = 1:12)

# plot
ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = month, y = value, fill = month)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~type, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = month_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = month.abb) +
  labs(
    title = "Seasonal Patterns: Observations vs Observer Ratio",
    x = "Month",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```


```{r}
autoplot(YRWA_obs_ts, series = "Observations") +
  autolayer(YRWA_ratio_ts * max(YRWA_obs_ts), 
            series = "Observer Ratio (scaled)") +
  xlab("Time") +
  ylab("Value") +
  ggtitle("Comparison: Observations vs Observer Ratio") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
    legend.justification = c(0, 1),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )
```


#### Observation Time Series Model

```{r}
adf.test(YRWA_obs_ts)
```

```{r}
ggAcf(YRWA_obs_ts)
ggPacf(YRWA_obs_ts)
```

##### SARIMA
```{r}
fit_obs_sarima <- auto.arima(
  YRWA_obs_ts,
  seasonal = TRUE
)

summary(fit_obs_sarima)
checkresiduals(fit_obs_sarima)
```
##### ARIMA +Fourier
```{r}
fit_obs_fourier <- auto.arima(
  YRWA_obs_ts,
  seasonal = FALSE,
  xreg = fourier(YRWA_obs_ts, K = 2)
)

summary(fit_obs_fourier)
checkresiduals(fit_obs_fourier)
```

##### ETS
```{r}
fit_obs_ets <- ets(YRWA_obs_ts)

summary(fit_obs_ets)
checkresiduals(fit_obs_ets)
```

##### Train test split
```{r}
obs_train_ts <- window(YRWA_obs_ts, end = c(2024, 12))
obs_test_ts  <- window(YRWA_obs_ts, start = c(2025, 1))

h <- length(obs_test_ts)

fit_obs_sarima_train <- auto.arima(obs_train_ts, seasonal = TRUE)

fit_obs_fourier_train <- auto.arima(
  obs_train_ts,
  seasonal = FALSE,
  xreg = fourier(obs_train_ts, K = 2)
)

fit_obs_ets_train <- ets(obs_train_ts)
```

##### Forecating
```{r}
fc_obs_sarima <- forecast(fit_obs_sarima_train, h = h)

fc_obs_fourier <- forecast(
  fit_obs_fourier_train,
  xreg = fourier(obs_train_ts, K = 2, h = h)
)

fc_obs_ets <- forecast(fit_obs_ets_train, h = h)
```

```{r}
autoplot(fc_obs_sarima) +
  autolayer(obs_test_ts, series = "Actual") +
  xlab("Time") +
  ylab("Mean Observations") +
  ggtitle("SARIMA Forecast vs Actual: YRWA Observations") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
    legend.justification = c(0, 1),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )
```
```{r}
autoplot(fc_obs_fourier) +
  autolayer(obs_test_ts, series = "Actual") +
  xlab("Time") +
  ylab("Mean Observations") +
  ggtitle("ARIMA + Fourier Forecast vs Actual: YRWA Observations") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
    legend.justification = c(0, 1),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
autoplot(fc_obs_ets) +
  autolayer(obs_test_ts, series = "Actual") +
  xlab("Time") +
  ylab("Mean Observations") +
  ggtitle("ETS Forecast vs Actual: YRWA Observations") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
    legend.justification = c(0, 1),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
obs_plot_df <- data.frame(
  Time = time(obs_test_ts),
  Actual = as.numeric(obs_test_ts),
  SARIMA = as.numeric(fc_obs_sarima$mean),
  Fourier = as.numeric(fc_obs_fourier$mean),
  ETS = as.numeric(fc_obs_ets$mean)
) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("SARIMA", "Fourier", "ETS"),
    names_to = "Model",
    values_to = "Forecast"
  )


ggplot(obs_plot_df, aes(x = Time)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Actual), linewidth = 1.1, color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = Forecast, color = Model), linewidth = 1) +
  xlab("Time") +
  ylab("Mean Observations") +
  ggtitle("Observed vs Forecasted YRWA Observations") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
    legend.justification = c(0, 1),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```


```{r}
obs_sarima_acc <- accuracy(fc_obs_sarima, obs_test_ts)
obs_fourier_acc <- accuracy(fc_obs_fourier, obs_test_ts)
obs_ets_acc <- accuracy(fc_obs_ets, obs_test_ts)

obs_acc_table <- rbind(
  SARIMA = obs_sarima_acc[2, c("RMSE", "MAE", "MAPE", "MASE")],
  Fourier_ARIMA = obs_fourier_acc[2, c("RMSE", "MAE", "MAPE", "MASE")],
  ETS = obs_ets_acc[2, c("RMSE", "MAE", "MAPE", "MASE")]
)

obs_acc_df <- data.frame(
  Model = rownames(obs_acc_table),
  obs_acc_table,
  row.names = NULL
)

obs_acc_df
```

```{r}
best_rmse_model <- obs_acc_df$Model[which.min(obs_acc_df$RMSE)]
best_mae_model <- obs_acc_df$Model[which.min(obs_acc_df$MAE)]
best_mase_model <- obs_acc_df$Model[which.min(obs_acc_df$MASE)]

best_rmse_model
best_mae_model
best_mase_model
```
```{r}
# Final SARIMA model (full data)
fit_obs_final <- auto.arima(
  YRWA_obs_ts,
  seasonal = TRUE
)

summary(fit_obs_final)
checkresiduals(fit_obs_final)

# forecast 24 months ahead
fc_obs_final <- forecast(
  fit_obs_final,
  h = 12
)

autoplot(fc_obs_final) +
  xlab("Time") +
  ylab("Mean Observations") +
  ggtitle("Final Forecast: YRWA Monthly Observations") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

```





#### Ratio Modeling

```{r}
YRWA_ratio_ts_cleaned <- tsclean(YRWA_ratio_ts)

autoplot(YRWA_ratio_ts, series = "Original Data") +
  autolayer(YRWA_ratio_ts_cleaned, series = "Cleaned Data") +
  xlab("Time") +
  ylab("Observer Ratio") +
  ggtitle("Outlier Removal (Not Recommended for Ratio Data)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
    legend.justification = c(0, 1),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
#STL
YRWA_ratio_stl <- stl(YRWA_ratio_ts, s.window = "periodic")

autoplot(YRWA_ratio_stl)
```


##### ACF & PACF
```{r}
# ADF test
adf.test(YRWA_ratio_ts)
```


```{r}
ggAcf(YRWA_ratio_ts)
ggPacf(YRWA_ratio_ts)
```

```{r}
# train: 2015–2024
YRWA_train_ts <- window(YRWA_ratio_ts, end = c(2024, 12))

# test: 2024–2025
YRWA_test_ts <- window(YRWA_ratio_ts, start = c(2025, 1))
```

##### SRIMA
```{r}
fit_ratio_sarima <- auto.arima(
  YRWA_train_ts,
  seasonal = TRUE
)

summary(fit_ratio_sarima)
checkresiduals(fit_ratio_sarima)
```

##### ARIMA + Fourier
```{r}
fit_ratio_fourier <- auto.arima(
  YRWA_train_ts,
  seasonal = FALSE,
  xreg = fourier(YRWA_train_ts, K = 2)
)

summary(fit_ratio_fourier)
checkresiduals(fit_ratio_fourier)
```

##### ETS
```{r}

fit_ratio_ets <- ets(YRWA_train_ts)

summary(fit_ratio_ets)
checkresiduals(fit_ratio_ets)
```



##### forecasting
```{r}
h <- length(YRWA_test_ts)

fc_ratio_sarima <- forecast(
  fit_ratio_sarima,
  h = h
)

fc_ratio_fourier <- forecast(
  fit_ratio_fourier,
  xreg = fourier(YRWA_train_ts, K = 2, h = h)
)

fc_ratio_ets <- forecast(
  fit_ratio_ets,
  h = h
)
```

```{r}
autoplot(fc_ratio_sarima) +
  autolayer(YRWA_test_ts, series = "Actual") +
  xlab("Time") +
  ylab("Observer Ratio") +
  ggtitle("SARIMA Forecast vs Actual: YRWA Observer Ratio") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
    legend.justification = c(0, 1),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
autoplot(fc_ratio_fourier) +
  autolayer(YRWA_test_ts, series = "Actual") +
  xlab("Time") +
  ylab("Observer Ratio") +
  ggtitle("ARIMA + Fourier Forecast vs Actual: YRWA Observer Ratio") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
    legend.justification = c(0, 1),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
autoplot(fc_ratio_ets) +
  autolayer(YRWA_test_ts, series = "Actual") +
  xlab("Time") +
  ylab("Observer Ratio") +
  ggtitle("ETS Forecast vs Actual: YRWA Observer Ratio") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
    legend.justification = c(0, 1),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )
```


```{r}
sarima_acc <- accuracy(fc_ratio_sarima, YRWA_test_ts)
fourier_acc <- accuracy(fc_ratio_fourier, YRWA_test_ts)
ets_acc <- accuracy(fc_ratio_ets, YRWA_test_ts)

rbind(
  SARIMA = sarima_acc[2, c("RMSE", "MAE", "MAPE", "MASE")],
  Fourier_ARIMA = fourier_acc[2, c("RMSE", "MAE", "MAPE", "MASE")],
  ETS = ets_acc[2, c("RMSE", "MAE", "MAPE", "MASE")]
)
```

```{r}
fit_ratio_sarima_final <- auto.arima(
  YRWA_ratio_ts,
  seasonal = TRUE
)

summary(fit_ratio_sarima_final)
checkresiduals(fit_ratio_sarima_final)
```

```{r}
h <- 12

fc_ratio_final <- forecast(
  fit_ratio_sarima_final,
  h = h
)

autoplot(fc_ratio_final) +
  xlab("Time") +
  ylab("Observer Ratio") +
  ggtitle("Forecast of YRWA Observer Ratio") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)
```
